profilePurpose: Connect generic safety-system guidance to the controls and systems available on a specific Train Sim World vehicle. Exact switch locations and reset sequences require manual or in-game evidence.

profiles.name: DB BR 411 ICE T
playerChecklist: Confirm Sifa, PZB/LZB and GNT states during cab setup.
Verify the active train-protection mode before departure.
Use GNT speed benefits only when the cab shows the system is available and active.
Follow LZB cab supervision when admitted to an LZB section.

profiles.name: DB BR 403 ICE 3
playerChecklist: Enable and verify Sifa and PZB/LZB during setup.
Expect the active supervision method to change between conventional and LZB sections.
Use the vehicle-specific acknowledgement and recovery controls described by its manual.

profiles.name: DB BR 423
playerChecklist: Verify Sifa and PZB are active before departure.
Use the train-specific PZB controls and cab indications.
Do not assume LZB is available merely because another train uses it on the same route.
